name: mm-monitoring
description: Root orchestration scripts for the Hyperliquid MM monitoring MVP.

scripts.setup: docker compose up -d --wait && npm install --prefix ingestor && npm install --prefix sla && npm install --prefix dashboard && npm run migrate --prefix ingestor
scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix ingestor && npm install --prefix sla && npm install --prefix dashboard
scripts.dev: docker compose up -d --wait && npm run migrate --prefix ingestor && concurrently --kill-others-on-fail -n ingestor,dashboard -c blue,magenta "npm run dev --prefix ingestor" "npm run dev --prefix dashboard"
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --prefix ingestor && npm run typecheck --prefix sla
scripts.db:reset: docker compose down -v && docker compose up -d --wait && npm run migrate --prefix ingestor
scripts.db:psql: docker exec -it mm_timescaledb psql -U mm -d mm_monitoring
